info.english_meaning: to grow to prosper to sound
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: atra SabdaH gajaSabdaH eva loke taTEva prayogAt  ' bfhir ' iti candradurgO  ' ...bfMhati barhati  vfdDO  BAzArTavizaye bfMhayet barhayediti ' ( Slo. 198 ) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'Sakto hantuM kimAtmAnaM jAtidozAd vibfMhasi' (mAtsya0 14022) vibfMhasi garjasi valgasi
'viSo vE maruto viSevEtat kzatraM paribfMhati' (Sa0 brA0 141327) paribfMhati varDate
'brahmadeyAgrahArAMSca paribarhAMSca pArTivaH …pAlayatyeva pARqavaH' (BA0 ASrama0 1041) paribarha OdvAhikamupAyanam

'niveSya gaNgAmanu tAM mahAnadIM camUM viDAnEH paribarhaSoBinIm' (rA0 28326) paribarho yAtropayuktapawaveSmAdyupakaraRajAtam paricCade nfpArherTe paribarha ityamaraH nfpopakaraRaM proktaM paribarhaH paricCada iti halAyuDaH
